creator: petef@databits.net
text:
Could you see if the patch at http://people.FreeBSD.org/~petef/kuickshow.diff
would be acceptable?  The changes I made:

- fix a typo with MASTER_SITES
- add USE_IMLIB
- remove redundant CONFIGURE_{ARGS,ENV} (USE_KDELIBS_VERS=2 implies the
  qt depend, which sets these automagically)
- replace patch with a regexp
- sort pkg-plist & try to remove share/locale hierarchy if empty

Thanks!

-pete

--
Pete Fritchman <petef@databits.net>
finger petef@databits.net for PGP key
